steps.observed: Game page loaded with 25 button squares, New Game button, and Share button

steps.action: Press Tab 5 times from page start
steps.expected: Focus lands on a square with visible focus indicator
steps.observed: Focus landed on 'Reviews a viewer's PR' button (5th square). Box-shadow showed visible teal ring: rgb(79, 184, 178) 0px 0px 0px 3px

steps.expected: Visible focus ring or outline on focused square
steps.observed: Box-shadow provides visible 3px teal focus ring (rgb(79, 184, 178)). Outline is none but focus ring achieved via box-shadow.

evidence.focusIndicatorDetail: box-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgb(255,255,255) 0px 0px 0px 1px, rgb(79,184,178) 0px 0px 0px 3px, rgba(0,0,0,0) 0px 0px 0px 0px

assertions.title: Squares can be toggled via keyboard

steps.action: Tab to 'Reviews a viewer's PR' square and note initial state
steps.observed: aria-pressed='false', no visual marking, bg: var(--surface)
aria-pressed changed to 'true', background changed to bg-[var(--lagoon)]/20, border changed to border-[var(--lagoon)]

steps.action: Press Space on the same focused square
steps.expected: Square toggles back to unmarked state

assertions.title: "New Game" and "Share" buttons are keyboard accessible

steps.action: Focus last square via JS, then press Tab to reach New Game button
steps.expected: Focus lands on 'New Game' button with visible focus indicator
steps.observed: Focus landed on 'New Game' button with visible teal focus ring (box-shadow: rgb(79,184,178) 0px 0px 0px 2px)

steps.action: Press Tab again to reach Share button
steps.expected: Focus lands on 'Share' button with visible focus indicator
steps.observed: Focus landed on 'Share' button with visible teal focus ring (box-shadow: rgb(79,184,178) 0px 0px 0px 2px)
Share button activated via Enter key (clipboard copy attempted)

steps.action: Focus New Game button via JS, press Enter
steps.expected: New Game action navigates to new seed
steps.observed: URL changed from /game?seed=a11ytest1 to /game?seed=HADAm077Sx — new game generated via keyboard activation

assertions.title: All interactive elements have appropriate ARIA roles

steps.action: Inspect DOM: count all native <button> elements
steps.expected: All interactive elements are native buttons or have appropriate roles
steps.observed: 27 native <button> elements total. 0 elements with role='button', 0 with role='gridcell', 0 with role='checkbox'.

steps.action: Inspect ARIA attributes on square buttons
steps.expected: Squares have aria-pressed attribute for toggle state
steps.observed: All 25 squares are native <button> elements with aria-pressed attribute. No explicit role needed since native <button> has implicit role='button'.

steps.action: Inspect ARIA attributes on New Game and Share buttons
steps.observed: New Game: native <button> with text 'New Game', no explicit role needed. Share: native <button> with text 'Share' and aria-label='Share'.

assertions.title: Marked state is communicated to assistive technology

steps.action: Check aria-pressed state of all squares before marking
Click first square to mark it
steps.observed: First square aria-pressed changed to 'true'. Also visible checkmark '✓' prefix added to text content.

steps.action: Count marked vs unmarked after toggling

ariaStateChange.after: aria-pressed='true' for marked square, 'false' for 24 others
ariaStateChange.additionalIndicator: Checkmark '✓' character prepended to marked square text content

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Squares are keyboard focusable with visible teal focus rings (box-shadow), squares toggle via Enter/Space keys, New Game and Share buttons are keyboard accessible via Tab + Enter activation, all interactive elements use native <button> with appropriate aria-pressed attributes, and marked state is communicated to assistive technology via aria-pressed state changes plus a '✓' checkmark text indicator.
